title:
Langkloof storm wreaks havoc
                                
                                
According to the shop owner, the wind suddenly picked up just after 16:00...

page.description: According to the shop owner, the wind suddenly picked up just after 16:00 yesterday afternoon, 5 February. “Massive trees look as if they were picked up by hand and twisted. Power lines were torn down. A large part of the Langkloof was damaged by the wind.”

title:
Screaming for justice
                                
                                
REGIONAL NEWS - A group of women and men gathered in Plettenberg Bay on...

page.description: REGIONAL NEWS - A group of women and men gathered in Plettenberg Bay on Saturday, 31 January, for a powerful protest. The protest was sparked by the violent murder of their friend, Nicky van Heerden (54), and was organised by Get Nosey. During the protest, a petition was handed to the police calling for the immediate establishment of a public registry of violent offenders.

title:
Gayton McKenzie besoek...
                                
                                
Die minister van sport en kultuur, Gayton McKenzie, het 'n splinternuwe...

page.description: Die minister van sport en kultuur, Gayton McKenzie, het 'n splinternuwe multi-sport fasiliteit by Heidedal Primêre Skool vandag, 20 Januarie, geopen. Tien skole van die omgewing sal hier na hartelus kan netbal, sokker en vlugbal speel.

title:
Die Bush Lapa Desember...
                                
                                
Van 16 Desember 2025 tot 2 Januarie 2026 bring Die Bush Lapa vir jou die...

page.description: Van 16 Desember 2025 tot 2 Januarie 2026 bring Die Bush Lapa vir jou die GROOTSTE kunstenaars in Suid-Afrika – almal saam op een ongelooflike stage!Maak hierdie feestyd onvergeetlik in die hart van Heroldsbaai met topvermaak, ’n ongelooflike atmosfeer en musiek wat net lekker is. Bespreek jou kaartjies nou!

title:
George Police Station trauma...
                                
                                
GEORGE NEWS - Watch and see the transformation of the George Police Station...

page.description: GEORGE NEWS - Watch and see the transformation of the George Police Station trauma room, brought to life by Lizelle Rheeder and the team from Lizelle Rheeder Physiotherapy, Estelle Stander and the local community. From a space in need of repair to a safe, welcoming haven, this makeover supports victims of trauma and highlights George’s commitment to standing against gender-based violence.

title:
A little death, a new...
                                
                                
Transition means change: the end of a chapter and the beginning of another. La...

page.description: Transition means change: the end of a chapter and the beginning of another. La Petite Mort (A little death) took the audience at the Arts Theatre on a journey of self discovery through different stages of change and growth. The performance last Saturday 22 November marked the end of a sucessful year for the BradWell Dance Collective.

title:
Women of Noble Character...
                                
                                
Women of Noble Character (Wonc), a social group founded four years ago by...

page.description: Women of Noble Character (Wonc), a social group founded four years ago by Allison Yon to support children in Rosemoor, held their anual Mish mash event last Saturday 8 November at the Rosemoor Community Hall. With a black-and-white dress code, guests looked stunning in their attire and had the opportunity to have their photos taken at a photo booth by photographer Jason Cupido.

title:
Menopause - A new lease...
                                
                                
Menopause remains one of the most under-discussed health topics, with many...

page.description: Menopause remains one of the most under-discussed health topics, with many women navigating symptoms in silence owing to stigma, misinformation and limited medical training on the subject.  The Let’s Talk Menopause event, held on 29 October at The Apprentice in George, was organised by Offlimit Communications. Photography: Munro Photography.

page.description: The Garden Route District celebrated the SAPS Prestige Awards 2025 with pride and excitement at the George Methodist Family Church on Wednesday 5 November. Photos by Marguerite van Ginkel

page.description: The George Business Chamber hosted a networking evening with an amazing view at the Hilltop Boutique Hotel in Victoria Bay on Thursday evening, 30 October.

title:
The demon barber of Fleet...
                                
                                
The gruesome tale of the 19th-century London barber’s wicked revenge plot was...

page.description: The gruesome tale of the 19th-century London barber’s wicked revenge plot was met with enthusiasm during its four-show run at the George Theatre. Now entering its final week - from Wednesday 5 to Saturday 8 November - the George Society of Arts’ latest production, Sweeney Todd, promises another round of dark humour and haunting music, directed by Candice Koen. Here are some lovely moments captured during rehearsals and last week’s shows.

page.description: The Hovering: A Living Presence, a show rich in colour, sound and imagery, came alive at the Market Community Theatre last Friday when a group of local artists collaborated to create an immersive experience of artistic expression.

The new brand was unveiled at an exclusive client event on 29 January at the...

page.description: The new brand was unveiled at an exclusive client event on 29 January at the Mossel Bay offices, attended by clients, staff, and key stakeholders. The celebration highlighted the firm’s journey and its integration into the PH brand.

title:
Garden Route Mall Christmas...
                                
                                
Two gift wrapping stations at Pick n Pay and Woolworths in the Garden Route...

page.description: Two gift wrapping stations at Pick n Pay and Woolworths in the Garden Route Mall managed to generate R65 000 from 19 to 24 December. The funds were distributed among seven local deserving non-profit organisations: R10 000 each to Empower, Life Community Services, the George Association for Persons with Disabilities, Bethesda Care Centre, Zenzele Aftercare and the Rosemoor Service Centre, as well as R5 000 to Tuiniqua Care Centre.

page.description: The tournament kicked off in Camps Bay on 7 December, before moving on to Kleinmond, Strand, Macassar, Struisbaai, Stilbaai and Dias Beach in Mossel Bay before yesterday's finals. on 29 December.

Competitors started the first day of the race in Hobie Beach in Plettenberg...

page.description: Competitors started the first day of the race in Hobie Beach in Plettenberg Bay, travelling 188.5km to reach their ending point in Mossel Bay.

title:
Successful police operations...
                                
                                
During special operations from 24 to 28 December 2025, the police arrested 828...

page.description: During special operations from 24 to 28 December 2025, the police arrested 828 suspects in the Garden Route District. The operations were part of the ongoing Safer Festive Season campaign.

title:
Optog teen misdaad in...
                                
                                
'n Optog is op Vrydag 19 Desember in Conville gehou om stemme dik te maak teen...

page.description: 'n Optog is op Vrydag 19 Desember in Conville gehou om stemme dik te maak teen toenemende misdaad. Die geleentheid is aangebied deur die Oosstreek van die DA in die Wes-Kaap. George se burgemeester, Browen Jonson, het 'n petisie aan die Conville-polisie oorhandig waarin die waarnemende minister van polisie, prof. Firoz Cachalia, versoek word om by sy departement in te gryp sodat polisiestasies beter toegerus kan word om misdaad te beveg.

title:
Mossel Bay Ironman 70.30...
                                
                                
The event started just before 07:00 this morning, 16 November at Santos Beach...

page.description: The event started just before 07:00 this morning, 16 November at Santos Beach where athletes took to the water to start a 1.9km swim before moving on to 90km cycle and then a 21.1km run.Spectators flocked to the Santos and De Bakke Beach area, many holding signs of support, others with cheeky messages cheering the athletes on.

kykNET Outdoor Expo Southern...

page.description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The second day of the kykNET Outdoor Expo Southern Cape saw hundreds of people flooding through the gates of the Hartenbos ATKV Amphitheatre today, 4 October. The last day of the expo is tomorrow, 5 October.

page.description: The expo, which was first held in Mossel Bay at the Amphitheatre in 2023, will be open for visitors until Sunday 5 October.

title:
Group Editors scoops awards...
                                
                                
Group Editors returned home from the Avbob FCJ (Forum of Community Journalists)...

page.description: Group Editors returned home from the Avbob FCJ (Forum of Community Journalists) Excellence Awards with the most sought-after prizes for news coverage in 2024. The winners were announced at a prize-giving dinner at the Protea Hotel Stellenbosch and Conference Centre, Techno Park, last Friday, 22 August. The adjudication process was overseen by Dr André Gouws of Akademia. Appart from winning numerous awards, Group Editors had an absolute ball at the function!

title:
Light aircraft does emergency...
                                
                                
Two people sustained minor injuries when they made an emergency landing in...

page.description: Two people sustained minor injuries when they made an emergency landing in their light aircraft, an Aero Commander, on a farm in the southern parts of Thembalethu, George, this morning, 23 August.There were no fatalities. The Garden Route District Municipality reported that the two injured crew members have been taken to hospital where they are being treated.

title:
Eden ryg 16 medaljes in...
                                
                                
Eden het sy status as een van Suid-Afrika se voorste toutrekstreke bevestig met...

page.description: Eden het sy status as een van Suid-Afrika se voorste toutrekstreke bevestig met ’n indrukwekkende vertoning by die pas afgelope SA Toutrekkampioenskappe in Hartenbos. Eden se mans, vroue en juniors, waaronder verskeie hoërskoolatlete, het 16 medaljes in die Premierliga en die Presidentsliga ingepalm.

title:

page.description: Die jaarlikse, aksiebelaaide Hart LOOP-atletiekbyeenkoms het Woensdag 4 Februarie plaasgevind by die De Jager-sportkompleks in Oudtshoorn.Langenhoven Gimnasium (Gimmies), Hoërskool Oudtshoorn (Struisies), Hoërskool Outeniqua (Kwaggas) en Hoërskool Punt het deelgeneem.

title:
Carpe Diem se skoolhoof en...
                                
                                
Daar is groot opgewondenheid by Carpe Diem Skool, waar skoolhoof Elzeth Grobler...

page.description: Daar is groot opgewondenheid by Carpe Diem Skool, waar skoolhoof Elzeth Grobler haar hare laat waai vir kanker. Elke derde jaar neem Grobler hierdie inspirererende besluit: sy laat haar hare groei en knip dit dan om dit aan Kansa te skenk, waar dit gebruik word vir die vervaardiging van pruike vir kankerpasiënte. Hierdie oomblik deel sy met die kinders van die skool vandag, 4 Februarie, op Wêreld Kankerdag. Vanjaar het nog ‘n paar onderwysers deelgeneem aan die pret. Karen Fourie het die skeerder gekies en met 'n no1-lem al haar hare laat waai. Grobler daag alle skole uit om Kansa op hierdie manier te ondersteun.

title:
Kleursportdag by PPS vol aksie
                                
                                
Pacaltsdorp Primêr se skoolterrein was verlede Vrydag, 23 Januarie, gevul met...

page.description: Pacaltsdorp Primêr se skoolterrein was verlede Vrydag, 23 Januarie, gevul met aksie, beweging en gesonde kompetisie, terwyl spangees en deursettingsvermoë oral tydens hul kleuresport sigbaar was.Van vinnige voete om die baan, vêr spronge, tot groot glimlagte, vang die foto’s die gees van die dag perfek vas. Leerders het hul beste gegee, mekaar aangemoedig en gewys dat sport nie net oor wen gaan nie, maar oor deelname, respek en pret.

title:

Leerders van Hoër Tegniese Skool Eden het omtrent laat waai tydens hul...

page.description: Leerders van Hoër Tegniese Skool Eden het omtrent laat waai tydens hul kleuresportbyeenkoms Vrydag 23 Januarie. Die skool se drie sporthuise - Victoria, Wildernis en Montagu - het die veld in rooi, groen en blou getooi.Vanjaar is Huis Montagu gekroon as die wenners, met Wildernis as die wenners van die geesbeker.Die Junior Victrix Lodorum is Daneeqa Botha en Caleb Mowera is vanjaar se Junior Victor Lodorum. Charlene Fortuin is die skool se Senior Victrix Lodorum, met Noa Gilbert as die Senior Victor Lodorum.

‘A million dreams’, York High’s theme for the year, manifested in colour at the...

page.description: ‘A million dreams’, York High’s theme for the year, manifested in colour at the colour athletics day on Eden THS’s sports fields this morning, Monday 26 January. The excitement is reaching extreme proportions as the teams compete on the tracks and their supporters on the pavillion.

page.description: HTS Eden se drie huise, Montagu, Victoria en Wilderness, gee mekaar opdraende op die atletiekveld. Die klomp is jolig met hope energie!

Touwsranten Primêr het Woensdag 14 Januarie hierdie jaar se graadeens...

page.description: Touwsranten Primêr het Woensdag 14 Januarie hierdie jaar se graadeens verwelkom. Die kinders is gou-gou in hul klasse ingedeel en het hulself tuisgemaak.

title:
Nuwe Carpies by Carpe...
                                
                                
Carpe Diem Skool het verlede week verskeie nuwe leerders verwelkom. Hierdie was...

page.description: Carpe Diem Skool het verlede week verskeie nuwe leerders verwelkom. Hierdie was ’n betekenisvolle oomblik vir kinders wat in baie gevalle al jare lank op ’n geskikte skoolplasing gewag het.

title:
Welcome to Grade 1!
                                
                                
The school year has officially kicked off, with schools across George welcoming...

page.description: The school year has officially kicked off, with schools across George welcoming their newest Grade One learners to their classrooms from Tuesday, 13 January.

title:
Bethesda children treated by...
                                
                                
Some 40 learners of the Outeniqua Primary School's Early Act Club, visited the...

page.description: Some 40 learners of the Outeniqua Primary School's Early Act Club, visited the children of the Milestone Development Programme at Bethesda. They played with the children and handed over gifts, cakes and snacks for them. It was the Early Act Club's last community project for the year.

title:
Kerspartytjie by Kekkel en...
                                
                                
Die kleingoed van die Kekkel en Kraai-speelgroep in Borcherds speel deesdae met...

page.description: Die kleingoed van die Kekkel en Kraai-speelgroep in Borcherds speel deesdae met die fraaiste slange van opgestopte dasse, asook handgemaakte lappoppe. Hierdie spesiale toevoeging tot die skool is te danke aan die handewerk van die Bergsig Senior Kuns- en Kuiergroep, wat weekliks brei, hekel en met afvallappe toor om unieke handgemaakte speelgoed vir kinders te skep. Die kleuters by Kekkel en Kraai het elk ’n speelding vir Kersfees ontvang, en die geskenkuitdeling is verlede Woensdag, 3 Desember, met ’n heerlike Kerspartytjie by die skool gevier.

page.description: The Nelson Mandela University's George Campus welcomed its first-year students with a special function at the Furntech Building on Saturday 31 January.

page.description: Kiesers en party-ondersteuners is vanoggend, Woensdag 21 Januarie, reeds vroeg uit die vere vir die tussenverkiesings in wyke 17 (Conville, Rosemoor) en 27 (dele van Pacaltsdorp). Die kandidate is Gail Ndukwana (ANC), Marchell Kleynhans (PA), Richard Hector (DA) en Victoria Rhoda (Truth and Solidarity Movement).

page.description: The Christmas Parkrun hosted in George at the Garden Route Botanical Garden attracted the most runners of all the Christmas parkruns in the country.

The George Community Police Forum's annual Christmas Mass Ride was a huge...

page.description: The George Community Police Forum's annual Christmas Mass Ride was a huge success and was well received by residents from the various CPF neighbourhoods.

title:
A Three-Level Retreat...
                                
                                
Recently renovated, this sun-filled residence overlooking Knysna Lagoon is...

page.description: Recently renovated, this sun-filled residence overlooking Knysna Lagoon is designed for flexibility and privacy. Each level functions as a self-contained living space, making it well-suited to families holidaying together. The open-plan layout maximises the sweeping views, while practical features such as solar power, inverters, and water tanks ensure uninterrupted comfort. From the balconies, lagoon views, and seasonal whale sightings, the experience is complete.

title:
The Glasshouse Getaway
                                
                                
Defined by light, openness, and uninterrupted coastal views, The Glasshouse...

page.description: Defined by light, openness, and uninterrupted coastal views, The Glasshouse offers a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living. Sunrises and sunsets are visible year-round, and the main suite features an outdoor shower, direct pool access, and a refined level of comfort. This home is designed for those seeking tranquillity and a close relationship with the natural environment.

title:
A Coastal Sanctuary in...
                                
                                
Perched above the ocean, this three-level residence captures the calm elegance...

page.description: Perched above the ocean, this three-level residence captures the calm elegance for which Plettenberg Bay is known. Automated roofing and blinds adapt to changing weather conditions, ensuring year-round comfort. Designed for hosting, the home features a bar, pool table, expansive dining area with ocean views, and a boma for evenings spent outdoors. A separate flatlet offers additional privacy for guests.

title:
A Modern Contemporary...
                                
                                
Set in Walmer, this modern farmhouse offers a more grounded yet refined escape....

page.description: Set in Walmer, this modern farmhouse offers a more grounded yet refined escape. Light oak finishes and integrated Siemens appliances create a warm, minimalist aesthetic. The outdoor entertainment area, complete with a pool and landscaped garden, encourages relaxed living. The main bedroom overlooks the garden, and a self-contained two-bedroom cottage allows for extended family stays, making the home ideal for shared holidays.

title:
Art and craft at 'The Art of...
                                
                                
The South Cape Association for Visual Arts' (Scava) market, 'The Art of...

page.description: The South Cape Association for Visual Arts' (Scava) market, 'The Art of Christmas', has been bringing some holiday cheer to the George Museum for the past week. It ends on Saturday 20 December at 12:00.

title:
Municipality's campaign says...
                                
                                
George Municipality, through its Gender and Disability Subsection, implemented...

page.description: George Municipality, through its Gender and Disability Subsection, implemented the 16 Days of Activism Against Gender-Based Violence Campaign 2025 under the theme 'Say no to gender-based violence'. Activities across the municipal area included a public picketing programme in the George CBD, followed by a memorial service in Syferfontein and a community march and awareness session in Touwsranten. Victim empowerment programmes for women and school-based GBV awareness sessions at Franken and Klipdrif Primary Schools were presented. There was also a thanksgiving and awareness service in Herold attended by approximately 350 community members. In Blanco, a GBV awareness roadblock was held and the campaign was concluded with a closing prevention session targeting young adults.

title:
Happy holidays!
                                
                                
The Christmas lights all down Oewer Street in Denneoord, switched on Saturday 6...

page.description: The Christmas lights all down Oewer Street in Denneoord, switched on Saturday 6 December, continue to be a seasonal hit, bringing that unmistakable holiday spirit to George. This week the street was alive with excitement as families came to enjoy the display. Adding to the atmosphere, the Steelwings Motorcycle Club joined in the celebrations on Monday 15 December.

title:
George Festival
                                
                                
GEORGE NEWS - Hundreds of Georgians gathered for the Annual Lights Festival on...

page.description: GEORGE NEWS - Hundreds of Georgians gathered for the Annual Lights Festival on Saturday 13 December, which marked the official switching on of the city's festive lights by Mayor Browen Johnson and Western Cape Minister of Cultural Affairs and Sport Ricardo Mackenzie.The lively atmosphere brought families, friends and visitors together to enjoy music, food and festive cheer in a vibrant celebration of community spirit.The weekend's festivities attracted over 6 000 festival-goers to York Street, setting the tone for continued celebrations across George and surrounding areas.

title:
Meiringspoort Challenge
                                
                                
Die Meiringspoort Challenge, een van die Klein-Karoo se gewildste...

page.description: Die Meiringspoort Challenge, een van die Klein-Karoo se gewildste buiteluggeleenthede, vind hierdie jaar op 16 Mei plaas.Die byeenkoms lok jaarliks deelnemers van regoor die land en bied roetes deur die Swartberg-omgewing en omliggende landbougebiede.

title:
Kaasburgers laat ons...
                                
                                
As daar nog enige twyfel was oor wat Tuinroete-hardlopers se harte - en mae -...

page.description: As daar nog enige twyfel was oor wat Tuinroete-hardlopers se harte - en mae - vinniger laat klop, is dit verlede Woensdag finaal uit die weg geruim: 'n warm, gratis kaasburger het die medaljes die kroon gesteek. Die tweede Chasing Cheese Burgers-padwedloop, wat op Woensdag 14 Januarie deur die Outeniqua Harriers-atletiekklub aangebied is, het weer 'n kleurvolle mengsel van entoesiastiese atlete uit dorpe regoor die Tuinroete gelok.

title:
Eden Triathlon Championships...
                                
                                
Perfect weather, fast racing and a glimpse of South Africa's future triathlon...

page.description: Perfect weather, fast racing and a glimpse of South Africa's future triathlon stars combined to make Sunday's third event of the Eden Triathlon Championships 2025/26 season a memorable one at Great Brak River.

title:
Stellar victories for Alan...
                                
                                
 Alan Hatherly and Hayley Preen started their 2026 seasons with stellar...

page.description: Alan Hatherly and Hayley Preen started their 2026 seasons with stellar victories in the Momentum Medical Scheme Attakwas Extreme, presented by Biogen. The 120-kilometre race from Chandelier Game Lodge, near Oudtshoorn, to the Pine Creek Resort, in Great Brak, featured a revised route that lent itself to faster times. As did the cool weather on Saturday, 17 January.

title:
First 4 days of UIPM Biathle,...
                                
                                
Days 1 to 3 of the UIPM Biathle, Triathle and Laser Run World Championships on...

page.description: Days 1 to 3 of the UIPM Biathle, Triathle and Laser Run World Championships on Mossel Bay’s Santos beach have come and gone and day 4 is in full swing. The championships kicked off on Monday 8 December.

title:
Reën demp nie Palm Tyre...
                                
                                
Nie eens swaar reën of die afwesigheid van twee van Atletiek SWD se uitblinkers...

page.description: Nie eens swaar reën of die afwesigheid van twee van Atletiek SWD se uitblinkers kon Saterdag die geesdrif by die 29ste Palm Tyre-padwedlope kelder nie. Waar die George-opgaardam se vlak al benoud laag is, het hardlopers die vroegoggend buie verwelkom - en met dieselfde ywer die nat strate aangedurf.

title:
Children enjoy Blue Ribbon...
                                
                                
SOCCER NEWS - The Black Cats Development U15s successfully defended their Blue...

page.description: SOCCER NEWS - The Black Cats Development U15s successfully defended their Blue Ribbon title against Eastern City on Sunday evening with a final score of 1-0. Photos: Zama Gagu

title:
To Hell and Back on a bicycle
                                
                                
“This year’s event was, I believe, a great success,” said Schmahl. “The weather...

page.description: “This year’s event was, I believe, a great success,” said Schmahl. “The weather played along, with cooler temperatures in the mornings, which made the riding pleasant, though it did get hot on Saturday afternoon. When it gets hot in Die Hel it really showcases why we moved the race village further into the Kloof. Yes, it adds nearly 15 kilometres to the stage distances, but the lush lawns of Boplaas, the ample shade, and the cool mountain water of the Oshoekshangrivier all help to offset the famous heat.” On the bike the racing was competitive for the minor places, though Hofmeyer and Jolande Marais cantered to victory in the men’s and women’s categories, respectively.

title:
Fiery Divas claim...
                                
                                
According to the dictionary, a diva is a self-important person who is...

page.description: According to the dictionary, a diva is a self-important person who is temperamental and difficult to please. But for the George-based Divas Netball Club, the name carries a far more inspiring meaning. It literally stands for dedication, integrity, victory, attitude and sportsmanship, values that continue to define this powerhouse team. Formed in 2017 with just 18 players, the Divas have grown into one of the Eden Netball Federation's (ENF) most successful clubs.

title:
40 jaar van...
                                
                                
'n Unieke toergroep bestaande uit 43 manne het onlangs die 40ste jaar van hul...

page.description: 'n Unieke toergroep bestaande uit 43 manne het onlangs die 40ste jaar van hul Suid-Kaap-gholftoer gevier.Oor hierdie 40 jaar het 142 lede al meer as 80 000 rondes gholf op Mosselbaai, Plettenbergbaai, Knysna en George gespeel.

title:
Young players battle it out...
                                
                                
Mossel Bay played host to a display of youthful talent on Saturday 1 November,...

page.description: Mossel Bay played host to a display of youthful talent on Saturday 1 November, as the Best View Fencing Invitational Squash Tournament brought together promising squash players of the region. The event featured a 16-player Swiss Pairing format, guaranteeing every participant four hard-fought matches.

title:
Triathlon season starts
                                
                                
The triathlon season officially started on Sunday 26 October with the first...

page.description: The triathlon season officially started on Sunday 26 October with the first race of the Eden Triathlon League held in Great Brak River.Despite a windy and wet day, a substantial field of athletes lined up at the start. The difficult conditions did little to dampen the spirits of the competitors, who were eager to dive into the new season of racing.
